SELECT k.id, k.pdate, k.price, k.discount, k.payment_method, k.amount, k.acc_id, k.rec_id
FROM kpayments k
JOIN rec r ON r.id = k.rec_id
JOIN kstu s ON s.id = r.st_id
WHERE s.full_name LIKE '%بدور%العلاطي%'
ORDER BY k.id DESC
LIMIT 20;" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\abd-allah\\Desktop\\mutmainah-center" && php artisan tinker --execute="
// اختبار الكويري الرئيسي
\\$from = '2026-03-11';
\\$to   = '2026-03-11';
\\$result = DB::table\('kpayments as k'\)
    ->join\('acck as a', 'a.id', '=', 'k.acc_id'\)
    ->leftJoin\('kstu as s', 's.id', '=', 'a.stu_id'\)
    ->leftJoin\('employees as e', 'e.id', '=', 'k.user_id'\)
    ->where\('k.acc_id', '>', 0\)
    ->whereIn\('k.status', [1, 2]\)
    ->whereRaw\(\\"STR_TO_DATE\(k.pdate, '%e-%c-%Y'\) >= ?\\", [\\$from]\)
    ->whereRaw\(\\"STR_TO_DATE\(k.pdate, '%e-%c-%Y'\) <= ?\\", [\\$to]\)
    ->select\(
        'k.id', 'k.pdate', 'k.pdesc', 'k.status', 'k.payment_method',
        DB::raw\('COALESCE\(NULLIF\(k.amount,0\), NULLIF\(k.price,0\), 0\) as mov_amount'\),
        's.full_name as patient_name', 's.id as patient_id',
        DB::raw\(\\"CONCAT\(IFNULL\(e.first_name,''\), IF\(e.middle_initial IS NOT NULL AND e.middle_initial != '', CONCAT\(' ', e.middle_initial\), ''\)\) as emp_name\\"\)
    \)
    ->orderByRaw\(\\"STR_TO_DATE\(k.pdate, '%e-%c-%Y'\) DESC, k.id DESC\\"\)
    ->limit\(3\)
    ->get\(\);
echo 'Count: ' . \\$result->count\(\) . PHP_EOL;
echo json_encode\(\\$result->first\(\)\) . PHP_EOL;
")
